overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character navigating rainy neon-lit urban environments. The character moves from rooftops through covered walkways and underpasses, ending on an elevated walkway overlooking busy streets. Heavy rain and fog create a moody atmosphere with dominant teal and pink neon lighting throughout the dense futuristic cityscape.

camera tilts upward to view towering residential building against night sky

safety railing along rooftop edge
external AC units mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy rooftop in a dense cyberpunk city. The character moves across wet concrete while the camera pans up to reveal a towering residential building covered in glowing windows. A red neon sign with Japanese characters stands prominently to the right, and a lone figure sits on a bench in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with teal neon lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with glass barriers and teal neon illumination
ambient light shifts to dominant teal cyan from overhead neon strips

agents.ego_description: character moves steadily along covered walkway passing concrete planters and glass barriers

entered.detail: transparent glass panels with metal frames along walkway edge
horizontal cyan neon light strips illuminating the covered passage
rectangular concrete boxes with dead plants

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway illuminated by striking teal neon lights. Glass barriers line the sides while concrete planters sit along the path. The heavy rain continues outside but the area is sheltered, creating a moody cyan-lit corridor through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with street vendor and pedestrians

events.description: entering underpass area with food vendor cart and warm artificial lighting
character navigates through group of pedestrians in narrow passage

agents.ego_description: character walks through underpass passing a food vendor cart and several pedestrians

pedestrians walking through underpass in various directions

entered.detail: mobile food stall with glowing warm lights and cooking equipment
large orange umbrella sheltering the food vendor cart
tall metal fencing along walkway sides
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the underpass
heaps of garbage bags and debris along the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker underpass where a food vendor tends a cart under an orange umbrella. Several pedestrians walk through the narrow space between metal fence barriers. Warm yellow lighting replaces the teal neon, and trash piles line the walls beneath an overhead walkway bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and corridor with advertisements

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs to upper level
entering corridor with illuminated wall advertisements

agents.ego_description: character ascends concrete stairs and walks through corridor with glowing advertisements

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with wall-mounted handrails
illuminated billboard showing vehicle advertisement with 'ELAMAIN' text
vertical lightbox with face image and text

segments.scene_description: The character climbs a concrete stairwell transitioning from the underpass to an upper level. The enclosed corridor features glowing wall advertisements including one for 'ELAMAIN' and another with a stylized face, lit by warm overhead fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking busy neon-lit street

events.description: exiting corridor onto elevated walkway with view of street traffic below
character stops to look down at traffic and street activity below

agents.ego_description: character walks along elevated walkway, pausing to overlook the busy street traffic and neon signs below

notable_agents.action: cars driving on multi-lane street below with headlights visible

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard with face image and 'Enjoy!' text glowing yellow
metal safety railing along edge of elevated pedestrian path
large metal framework carrying traffic lights and signs above street
traffic signals showing red lights above the street
rain-slicked road reflecting neon lights from signs and vehicles

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the character walks along an elevated walkway overlooking a bustling street. A massive vertical billboard displaying 'Enjoy!' dominates the right side while traffic flows below on the wet, neon-reflecting streets. Red traffic lights hang from overhead structures as the rain continues to fall on the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an exposed, rainy rooftop into the sheltered, neon-lit depths of a dense cyberpunk city. It begins on wet concrete under a towering residential building, panning up toward glowing windows and a prominent red neon sign as a lone figure sits in the distance. As the character moves forward, the open rooftop shifts into a covered walkway where the lighting transforms into a striking teal glow reflected off glass barriers and concrete planters. The scene then descends into a darker underpass, where the cyan tones are replaced by the warm yellow light of a food vendor's orange umbrella. Finally, the camera navigates through a narrow corridor of metal fences and trash-lined walls beneath an overhead bridge as pedestrians pass by.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, glowing corridor into a vast, rain-slicked urban vista. It begins as the character climbs a concrete stairwell, moving through an enclosed space illuminated by warm overhead fixtures and vibrant wall advertisements for Elamain. As the character emerges from the corridor, the environment abruptly opens up onto an elevated walkway overlooking a bustling city street. The scene then expands to reveal a massive vertical Enjoy billboard dominating the skyline while red traffic lights hang over the wet roads below. Finally, the camera settles on the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape, where neon lights reflect off the surfaces of the heavy rain.
